overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player walking through a narrow industrial corridor lined with neon-lit vending machines and advertisements, then emerging into a bright open-air food stall area where a vendor stands behind a cluttered counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dim corridor past colorful vending machines and glowing advertisements

entered.detail: yellow vending machine with colorful 'Leelou Beans' advertisement display
illuminated vertical advertisement panel showing a beverage bottle
handwritten style sign marking the corridor entrance
rusted corrugated metal walls lining both sides of the narrow passage
neon sign for DAKAI product mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow industrial corridor illuminated by neon vending machines and advertisements. The walls are made of corrugated metal, and the floor appears to be concrete or metal grating. The corridor is empty of people, with various commercial signs providing the primary light sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air street food stall at corridor exit

events.description: exits the narrow corridor into the bright outdoor food stall area
transition from artificial neon lighting to bright natural sunlight streaming from outside

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall counter where a vendor is preparing food

notable_agents.action: standing behind the food stall counter facing cooking equipment

entered.detail: cluttered food preparation counter with various cooking items and containers
stoves and food preparation equipment arranged on the counter
overhead metal roof structure providing partial cover over the stall
bright sunlight streaming from the open area beyond the food stall

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor into a bright open-air food stall sheltered by a metal awning. A vendor stands behind a cluttered counter with cooking equipment. The transition from neon-lit interior to sunlit exterior is dramatic, with the DAKAI advertisement now visible in the background while the player approaches the stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim, neon-lit industrial corridor into a bright, open-air marketplace. It begins by gliding through a narrow passage of corrugated metal walls and grating floors, where the primary light is cast by glowing vending machines and commercial advertisements. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space suddenly opens up, shifting dramatically from the artificial neon glow to the brilliance of natural sunlight. The scene then expands under a metal awning to reveal a cluttered food stall, with the camera approaching a vendor standing behind cooking equipment while a DAKAI advertisement remains visible in the background.
